name: gm-lore-parser
author: Zandao
description: System-agnostic GM toolkit. A lorebook-hosted System Definition ([SYSTEM_DEF]) declares the ruleset; a unified [ENTITY] engine drives player/NPC/companion/creature stat blocks; [CAPABILITY] unifies boons/titles/passives/evolution/skills with configurable progression. Tracks party/scene rosters, emits always-on GM behavioral directives, maintains lorebooks, capabilities, factions, quests, currency, needs, keyword-triggered [System Rule] entries, a live status panel, and a built-in in-narrative status header. Modular build — logic in modules/ loaded at runtime.
